title: AI News Jun 29 — Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI'
description: Imagine a world where the most powerful AI systems are being exploited by cybercriminals, targeting the very heart of enterprise AI - that's the reality we're facing today. In the past two years, businesses have been rapidly adopting large language models, or LLMs, to fit into support, analytics, development, and internal automation, but along with this adoption, a new trend has emerged: cybercriminals are taking advantage of the disconnect between assumptions about LLMs and their actual charact...

title: AI News Jun 29 — Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI'
description: The AI revolution is in full swing, but a dark cloud is looming over the enterprise AI landscape - hackers have discovered a way to exploit the biggest design flaws in large language models, and it's got everyone on high alert. In the past two years, businesses have been rushing to integrate AI into every aspect of their operations, from support and analytics to development and automation. But as it turns out, this rapid adoption has also created a slew of new vulnerabilities that cybercriminals...
